name: a consumer config without a project key defaults the overlay id to the config directory's sanitized name
command:
APP=/tmp/cl564-r61-repo.name$$; mkdir -p $APP/rules && printf '

Solo team rule

Every service must publish an owner.

' > $APP/s.html && cat > $APP/ctp.config.yaml <e.err; D=$(basename $APP); [ -f $APP/rules/_project/$D/_universal/solo-src.yaml ] && grep -q "WROTE sid=solo-src" e.err && echo overlay-defaults-to-directory-name 1>&2; rm -rf $APP
